theme: The Gap Between Stereotypical Extremism and Statistical Moderation
description: Many participants expressed surprise because the data revealed the out-party to be more moderate or less supportive of extreme actions than their initial, often exaggerated, predictions suggested.
codes: Perceived similarity and consensus across groups

theme: Ethical and Affective Reactions to Partisan Realities
description: This theme encompasses the emotional weight and moral judgment participants apply to the findings, including disappointment, out-party animosity, and expectations of civic norms.
